ab: cyan maki muyax yaki ga?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: cyan, cyan m’abi ’byan nya kya.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: cyan maki muyax yaki ga?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: ini kaki, wayal tanux mwani, gbyan ga mwah muyax.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: cyan maki muyax yutas ga?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: cyan maki te saying krawan muyax, trkah isu hali hkani hiya.
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: maki cquliq nya muyax ga?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: baq isu Yuraw ga, mbisyq su ini ktaliy, lokah su ga?
ch: B:是Yuraw阿，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s Yuraw. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: lokah cu, nyan cu mwah hkani mcisal isu.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: cyan inu yaba su?
en: Where is your father?

ab: cyan psyus rramat tnpuyan kya, sgyaw mu.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: wayal inu Ciwas la?
en: Where did Ciwas go?

ab: wayal miyap ngta kya libu ngta.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: yutas nyan cami la.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: ini kaki muyax kya yutas mamu, cyan maki claqan kya, si mnna uwah nya muyax cimu.
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: mama ’nyan su la ga?
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: mbsyaq ini pktayux nyan su hmlawax la.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: ktalan mu ’nyan su ga mqas calay lungan.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: onray qani ga bniq cimu, syaniy iyik kulu tltuw.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: bsyaq ciyal ini cimu uwah, sgyaw mu qabax ta squn maniq.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: ana qeri ta tyagiy la, si cu nbux oca. bkal ta mcisal iyik muyax.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: ta tkkoh, si ta nbux oca. mcisal ta iyik muyax.
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: knut coni ngta qani, aray muyax thwayiy maniq.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
